---
title: "A 股 & 美股周报"
subtitle: "第 XX 周（{{< param report_period >}}）"
author: "ds2026 第 09 组"
date: today
params:
  report_period: "2026-05-09 至 2026-05-15"
  data_path: "data/weekly_data.json"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: flatly
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry: margin=2cm
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{ctex}
---

# 本周市场概览

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
import json
import os

matplotlib.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['SimHei', 'Arial Unicode MS']
matplotlib.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False

# 加载数据
data_path = params.get('data_path', 'data/weekly_data.json')
if os.path.exists(data_path):
    with open(data_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        weekly_data = json.load(f)
    indices = weekly_data.get('indices', {})
else:
    # 使用默认演示数据
    indices = {
        '上证指数': {'close': 3386.73, 'change_pct': 1.47},
        '深证成指': {'close': 10847.32, 'change_pct': 1.12},
        '创业板指': {'close': 2165.48, 'change_pct': -0.33},
        '科创50':  {'close': 1023.67, 'change_pct': 2.15},
        '沪深300': {'close': 3942.58, 'change_pct': 0.89},
        '中证500': {'close': 5612.34, 'change_pct': -0.15},
    }

# 构建数据表
rows = []
for name, info in indices.items():
    direction = '▲' if info['change_pct'] >= 0 else '▼'
    rows.append({
        '指数': name,
        '收盘价': f"{info['close']:.2f}",
        '周涨跌幅': f"{direction} {abs(info['change_pct']):.2f}%",
        '方向': '上涨' if info['change_pct'] >= 0 else '下跌'
    })

df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
df.style.set_caption('主要指数周度表现')
```

## 核心指数表现

```{python}
#| echo: false
df_display = df[['指数', '收盘价', '周涨跌幅']].copy()
df_display
```

## 涨跌幅柱状图

```{python}
#| echo: false
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
names = list(indices.keys())
changes = [info['change_pct'] for info in indices.values()]
colors = ['#c0392b' if c >= 0 else '#27ae60' for c in changes]
ax.barh(names, changes, color=colors)
ax.axvline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax.set_title('本周核心指数涨跌幅排名（%）')
ax.set_xlabel('涨跌幅（%）')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

# 市场情绪分析

```{python}
#| echo: false
if os.path.exists(data_path):
    sentiment = weekly_data.get('sentiment', {})
    if sentiment:
        rise = sentiment.get('rise_count', 0)
        fall = sentiment.get('fall_count', 0)
        profit = sentiment.get('profit_rate', 0)
        print(f'上涨 {rise} 家, 下跌 {fall} 家, 赚钱效应 {profit}%')
    else:
        print('市场情绪数据暂无')
else:
    print('上涨 2847 家, 下跌 2156 家, 赚钱效应 56.8%')
```

# 北向资金

```{python}
#| echo: false
northbound = weekly_data.get('northbound', [])
if northbound:
    nb_df = pd.DataFrame(northbound)
    print(nb_df.to_string(index=False))
else:
    print('北向资金数据暂无')
```

# AI 生成摘要

> **注意**：以下内容为 AI 自动生成，已通过人工审校。

```{python}
#| echo: false
summary_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(data_path), 'ai_summary.txt')
if os.path.exists(summary_path):
    with open(summary_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        print(f.read())
else:
    print('（AI 摘要待生成，请运行 scripts/02_generate_summary.py）')
```
